productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Chic Melange Grey Top
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has print all over the front with metallic embellishments on  the left chest and three quarter sleeves with mid-cuff buttonFittingSlimWash careMachine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wringDry in shadeMedium ironThis muted grey t-shirt from jealous 21 is a great choice for all seasons. The stripes on the front make your frame look robust, while the metallic embellishments in the shape of a star add fizz to the tee. Your slender arms will look even more sleek with the three quarter sleeves and a fold over button that allows you to roll them up into a half-sleeve style. Pair this tee with skinny jeans and stilettos for an ultimate glam look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
